---
title: "lungquery_UMAPS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```
```{r}
lungQuery <-readRDS("C:/Users/Sshaikh9/Downloads/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```
```{r azimuth_umap, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
dir.create("Plots_UMAP", showWarnings = FALSE)

p_l1 <- DimPlot(
  lungQuery,
  group.by = "predicted.ann_level_1",
  label = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.01,
  label.size = 6,
  repel = TRUE,
  raster = FALSE
) + ggtitle("Azimuth Annotation - Level 1")

print(p_l1)

ggsave(
  filename = "Plots_UMAP/UMAP_Azimuth_Level1.png",
  plot = p_l1,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
